creator: fabian.freyer@physik.tu-berlin.de
text: I've taken a look at it so far, and while it does seem to be possible to build the package with clang on Linux, it doesn't seem to work on FreeBSD so far. I've yet to properly understand the build system, but it doesn't seem to be a trivial change. Perhaps grehan@ (CC'ing him) might shed some light on this, as he added support for building on FreeBSD in the first place.
